name: WARRANT OFFICER || Nao Yushimo
description:
—keep you safe.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

elegance and harshness personified was Nao in all her glory. the warrant officer only had her wife in mind, the woman of her dreams.

but what would she say if her darling wife wanted to join the army? the answer was simple— absolutely not.

𓏵· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·𓏵
